message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object: "question": "Chapters"/"Description"/"Structure" accordingly. Provide feedback text. And "complies": true/false.

We need to evaluate the given text against each question.

Question 1: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text mentions "Teorētiskā daļa šajā darbā sniedz padziļinātu pārskatu ...". It says "Tā sākas ar analīzi pirms digitalizācijas ēras, ... Tālāk tiek analizēts agrīnās digitalizācijas laikmets ... Trešajā nodaļā ... Noslēgumā tiek aplūkoti mūzikas analīzes rīki ...". It mentions "Trešajā nodaļā" and "Noslēgumā". But does it list main sections? It refers to sections but not explicitly list them as chapters. It says "Teorētiskā daļa" and "Trešajā nodaļā". It does not explicitly list all main sections like introduction, literature review, methodology, results, conclusion. So likely does not fully list main sections. So compliance false.

Question 2: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes contents of the theoretical part: before digitalization, early digitalization, modern approaches, tools. So yes, it briefly describes contents of each section. So compliance true.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text gives a sense of structure: theoretical part, three subsections, conclusion. But does it show general structure? It mentions "Teorētiskā daļa" and "Trešajā nodaļā" and "Noslēgumā". It doesn't mention other parts like methodology, results, discussion. So general structure is not fully clear. So compliance false.

Thus produce array with three objects.

Make sure JSON is correct.
